since_last: 58% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.84%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC -0.20% · Gold +0.41% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 58% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.84%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.84%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.26%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +9.33%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +9.33%, NOW +4.55%, CRM +4.11%, OKLO +3.80%, OKLO +3.80%. Laggards: MU -3.26%, EQIX -3.20%, AMAT -2.52%, KLAC -2.23%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.91% at $174.13
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.91% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
